parity.notes: Counted on the reference solutions (both arms structurally parallel): 1 static class/module + WindowSum (loop, 2) + WindowMin (loop + branch, 3) + MaxWindowSum (loop + branch, 3) + CountAbove (degenerate guard + loop + branch, 4). Complexity = 1 per function + 1 per branch/loop. Second-wave hardness pair (accumulator initialization on all-negative/all-positive input, last-window off-by-one, strict-vs-inclusive threshold, count > length degenerate); NOT yet difficulty-validated (gates doc §3.1).

wedgeWhitelistCheck: Calor-arm contracts: (>= start 0), (> count 0) — comparisons over i32 parameters and integer literals; (<= (+ start count) §LEN values), (<= count §LEN values) — arithmetic and comparison against array length of a simple variable base (modeled-forms §2, ArrayLengthNode -> u32 $length variable); (>= result 0) on CountAbove. No function calls, no floats, no strings, no computed array bases, no generic-typed values appear in any contract. All functions are pure (§E{}), so no effect-manifest coverage is required.
retiredReason: hardness-check-001: at ceiling; cannot power the 2a gate
